title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 11.050 - Official publications — filing of manuscripts
text:
11.050.  Official publications — filing of manuscripts. — The secretary of state shall file a copy of every manuscript, and a copy of the endorsement thereon, and the further notation indicating the name of the official publication, or document in which the same may legally be published.
(RSMo 1939 § 15009, A.L. 1957 p. 726) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 13816
